purpose: Common shape for one standards-family authority index. A group index names the family, explains when to enter it, and maps artifact kinds to their standards and path patterns.

artifact_shape.path_globs: list of repo-relative glob patterns for the governed artifact kind
artifact_shape.description: short explanation of the artifact kind
artifact_shape.authority_rule: optional short note about which surface is authoritative or how regeneration works

kernel_navigation_hint_shape.when: what situation should trigger this hint
kernel_navigation_hint_shape.next_read_order: optional ordered list of follow-up files
kernel_navigation_hint_shape.commands: optional list of related kernel commands

validation_rules: Every artifact kind should point to a real json_standard path.
Use markdown_standard only when there is a real human-facing companion doc.
Support assets belong here only when they materially help navigation, authoring, or regeneration.
Keep descriptions concrete enough that an agent can choose the right standard without opening every file.
